mapper.select: SELECT id, title, category_id, file_name, storage_name, file_type, file_size, enabled, parse_status, parse_error, retry_count, uploaded_by, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM kb_document WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, title, category_id, file_name, storage_name, file_type, file_size, enabled, parse_status, parse_error, retry_count, uploaded_by, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM kb_document WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC FETCH FIRST #{limit} ROWS ONLY
mapper.update: UPDATE kb_document SET enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE kb_document SET parse_status = #{parseStatus}, parse_error = #{parseError,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

UPDATE kb_document SET parse_status = CASE WHEN retry_count + 1 >= #{maxRetryCount} THEN 'PARSE_FAILED' ELSE 'PENDING_PARSE' END, parse_error = #{parseError,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, retry_count = retry_count + 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE kb_document SET parse_status = 'PARSE_FAILED', parse_error = #{parseError,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, retry_count = retry_count + 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE kb_document SET parse_status = 'PENDING_PARSE', parse_error = NULL, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 AND parse_status = 'PARSE_FAILED'
